description: Cross-language type system, runtime values, signatures, wire protocol, API types, Language enum

features.name: TraitType type matching
features.description: TraitValue::matches_type validates runtime values against declared types with coercion rules

features.name: TraitValue type_name
features.description: Returns human-readable type names for error messages

features.name: TraitValue JSON round-trip
features.description: to_json and from_json preserve value semantics across serialization

tests.name: trait call with JSON args round-trips correctly

features.name: Handle detection
features.description: is_handle, handle_id, handle_language detect and parse handle references

features.name: WorkerRequest/WorkerResponse wire protocol
features.description: Serialization of worker messages supports regular, streaming chunk, and stream end modes

tests.name: worker protocol used in trait calls

features.name: CallRequest/CallResponse API types
features.description: HTTP API request/response types support positional and named args

tests.name: API types used for CLI call dispatch

features.name: Language enum
features.description: Supported languages with lowercase serialization and Display impl
